title: Japanese Ochazuke Rice Bowl
description: A traditional Japanese dish made with steamed rice, xeridic, and green tea. A comforting and easy meal to prepare.
instructions: Rinse the Japanese rice thoroughly and cook according to the package instructions.
Steep the xeridic in hot water for 5-7 minutes.
Once the rice is cooked, transfer it to a bowl and add the steamed xeridic on top.
Pour the green tea over the rice and xeridic.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional xeridic if desired.
